channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Schiff acknowledges Trump DOJ may have case against Newsom
Greenspan's approach may return under Warsh
item.description: Some of Alan Greenspan's most notable traits as a central banker, along with his greatest weaknesses, may be revisited under new leadership.

item.title: Judge blocks Trump administration subpoena of Walz in immigration probe
item.description: A federal judge halted a Trump administration attempt to subpoena Minnesota Governor Tim Walz and other state officials, calling it an overreach.

item.title: Maryland faces scrutiny over delayed removal of illegal immigrant from voter roll
item.description: A Maryland GOP lawmaker argues that the two-year delay in removing an illegal immigrant from voter rolls undermines public trust in elections.
